'''âsh-dh-t''' ('''kashadhat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:precess|precess]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-dh-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:precess|precess]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-dh-t
|-
! Lemma
| kashadhat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishadhat|thishadhat]] || [[word:jishadhat|jishadhat]] || [[word:shishadhat|shishadhat]] || [[word:kishadhat|kishadhat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushadhat|thuthushadhat]] || [[word:jujushadhat|jujushadhat]] || [[word:shushushadhat|shushushadhat]] || [[word:kukushadhat|kukushadhat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushadhat|thushadhat]] || [[word:jushadhat|jushadhat]] || [[word:shushadhat|shushadhat]] || [[word:kushadhat|kushadhat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushadhat|thushadhat]] || [[word:jushadhat|jushadhat]] || [[word:shushadhat|shushadhat]] || [[word:kushadhat|kushadhat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theshadhat|theshadhat]] || [[word:jeshadhat|jeshadhat]] || [[word:sheshadhat|sheshadhat]] || [[word:keshadhat|keshadhat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoshadhat|thothoshadhat]] || [[word:jojoshadhat|jojoshadhat]] || [[word:shoshoshadhat|shoshoshadhat]] || [[word:kokoshadhat|kokoshadhat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshadhat|thoshadhat]] || [[word:joshadhat|joshadhat]] || [[word:shoshadhat|shoshadhat]] || [[word:koshadhat|koshadhat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshadhat|thoshadhat]] || [[word:joshadhat|joshadhat]] || [[word:shoshadhat|shoshadhat]] || [[word:koshadhat|koshadhat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠshadhat|thĂŠshadhat]] || [[word:jĂŠshadhat|jĂŠshadhat]] || [[word:shĂŠshadhat|shĂŠshadhat]] || [[word:kĂŠshadhat|kĂŠshadhat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathashadhat|thathashadhat]] || [[word:jajashadhat|jajashadhat]] || [[word:shashashadhat|shashashadhat]] || [[word:kakashadhat|kakashadhat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashadhat|thashadhat]] || [[word:jashadhat|jashadhat]] || [[word:shashadhat|shashadhat]] || [[word:kashadhat|kashadhat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashadhat|thashadhat]] || [[word:jashadhat|jashadhat]] || [[word:shashadhat|shashadhat]] || [[word:kashadhat|kashadhat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shashadhat|shashadhat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshashadhat|goshashadhat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishashadhat|gokishashadhat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shashadhatnĂŒ|shashadhatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshashadhatnknĂŒ|goshashadhatnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishashadhatnĂŒ|gokishashadhatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shashadhatshĂ«|shashadhatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshashadhatnkshĂ«|goshashadhatnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishashadhatshĂ«|gokishashadhatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashadhatro|shashadhatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashadhatnkro|goshashadhatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashadhatro|gokishashadhatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shashadhatmu|shashadhatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashadhatnkmu|goshashadhatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashadhatmu|gokishashadhatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shashadhatsher|shashadhatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshashadhatnksher|goshashadhatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishashadhatsher|gokishashadhatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shashadhatng|shashadhatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshashadhatnkng|goshashadhatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishashadhatng|gokishashadhatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shashadhatya|shashadhatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshashadhatnkya|goshashadhatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishashadhatya|gokishashadhatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shashadhatyam|shashadhatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshashadhatnkyam|goshashadhatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishashadhatyam|gokishashadhatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashadhatnĂŒshĂ«|shashadhatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashadhatnknĂŒshĂ«|goshashadhatnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashadhatnĂŒshĂ«|gokishashadhatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashadhatnĂŒro|shashadhatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashadhatnknĂŒro|goshashadhatnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashadhatnĂŒro|gokishashadhatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashadhatnĂŒmu|shashadhatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashadhatnknĂŒmu|goshashadhatnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashadhatnĂŒmu|gokishashadhatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashadhatshĂ«nĂŒ|shashadhatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashadhatnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshashadhatnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashadhatshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishashadhatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashadhatshĂ«ro|shashadhatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashadhatnkshĂ«ro|goshashadhatnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashadhatshĂ«ro|gokishashadhatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashadhatshĂ«mu|shashadhatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashadhatnkshĂ«mu|goshashadhatnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashadhatshĂ«mu|gokishashadhatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashadhatronĂŒ|shashadhatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashadhatnkronĂŒ|goshashadhatnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashadhatronĂŒ|gokishashadhatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashadhatroshĂ«|shashadhatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashadhatnkroshĂ«|goshashadhatnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashadhatroshĂ«|gokishashadhatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashadhatromu|shashadhatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashadhatnkromu|goshashadhatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashadhatromu|gokishashadhatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashadhatmunĂŒ|shashadhatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashadhatnkmunĂŒ|goshashadhatnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashadhatmunĂŒ|gokishashadhatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashadhatmushĂ«|shashadhatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashadhatnkmushĂ«|goshashadhatnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashadhatmushĂ«|gokishashadhatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashadhatmuro|shashadhatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashadhatnkmuro|goshashadhatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashadhatmuro|gokishashadhatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
